items.title: Solana Changelog: July 9, 2026
items.whyYouShouldCare: The latest Solana Changelog highlights ongoing infrastructure improvements, which are crucial for enhancing network performance and attracting developers.

items.title: Solana under pressure: Pump.fun’s $10M SOL move sparks THIS Q3 debate
items.whyYouShouldCare: Pump.fun's $10M SOL transaction raises questions about liquidity and market dynamics in Q3, potentially impacting SOL's price stability.

items.title: Stripe-owned Privy and Jito co-develop Solana transaction inclusion tool FullSend
items.whyYouShouldCare: The collaboration between Privy and Jito on the FullSend tool could streamline transaction processes on Solana, increasing ecosystem efficiency and user engagement.
